description: Human-authored explainability copy for AgentGuard risk signals

copyPrinciples.AG-PROMPT-089: Calm seatbelt principle - inform without alarming
rules: Non-judgmental: user decides what to do
Actionable: tell them what they can do

secret.api_key.title: API key
secret.api_key.why: API keys let programs access services on your behalf. If shared, someone could use your accounts.
secret.api_key.suggestedAction: Remove or rotate the key before uploading.

secret.aws_key.title: AWS access key
secret.aws_key.why: AWS keys give access to cloud resources. Sharing could lead to unexpected usage or charges.
secret.aws_key.suggestedAction: Rotate this key if it may have been shared.

secret.password.title: Password
secret.password.why: Passwords give direct access to accounts. Sharing them externally is risky.

secret.private_key.title: Private key
secret.private_key.why: Private keys are used for secure login and encryption. If shared, they could be misused.
secret.private_key.suggestedAction: Don't share private key files. Generate new keys if needed.

pii.ssn.title: Social Security Number
pii.ssn.why: SSNs are critical personal identifiers. Sharing them could enable identity theft.
pii.ssn.suggestedAction: Remove or redact SSNs before uploading.

pii.ssn.locale_gated.title: Number pattern
pii.ssn.locale_gated.why: This looks like a US Social Security Number format, but could be a different type of reference number in other regions.
pii.ssn.locale_gated.suggestedAction: Check if this is actually sensitive for your region.

pii.credit_card.title: Payment card number
pii.credit_card.why: Card numbers are financial data. Sharing them externally could create compliance issues.
pii.credit_card.suggestedAction: Remove or mask card numbers before uploading.

pii.phone.title: Phone number
pii.phone.why: Phone numbers are personal contact information that may be subject to privacy rules.
pii.phone.suggestedAction: Consider whether phone numbers need to be included.

pii.phone.density.title: Multiple phone numbers
pii.phone.density.why: This file has many phone numbers. It might be a contact list or directory.
pii.phone.density.suggestedAction: Review whether this contact information should be shared externally.

pii.email.title: Email address
pii.email.why: Email addresses are personal contact information that may be subject to privacy rules.
pii.email.suggestedAction: Consider whether email addresses need to be included.

pii.email.density.title: Multiple email addresses
pii.email.density.why: This file has multiple email addresses. It might be a mailing list or directory.
pii.email.density.suggestedAction: Review whether sharing this contact information is appropriate.

pii.employee.title: Employee information
pii.employee.why: Employee data is usually confidential and protected by internal policies.
pii.employee.suggestedAction: HR data generally shouldn't be shared externally.

pii.compensation.title: Salary information
pii.compensation.why: Salary and compensation details are typically confidential.
pii.compensation.suggestedAction: This probably shouldn't be shared externally.

financial.iban.title: Bank account (IBAN)
financial.iban.why: IBANs identify bank accounts. Sharing them could be risky.
financial.iban.suggestedAction: Check if sharing banking information externally is appropriate.

financial.banking.title: Banking information
financial.banking.why: Banking details like routing numbers should be protected.
financial.banking.suggestedAction: Consider removing banking information before uploading.

financial.data.title: Financial data
financial.data.why: Financial projections and budgets are often confidential.
financial.data.suggestedAction: Review whether this should be shared externally.

legal.contract.title: Legal agreement
legal.contract.why: Legal documents often contain confidential terms.
legal.contract.suggestedAction: Check if sharing this externally is permitted.

legal.nda.title: Non-disclosure agreement
legal.nda.why: NDAs may restrict sharing information with third parties.
legal.nda.suggestedAction: Review the NDA terms before sharing.

confidential.marker.title: Marked as confidential
confidential.marker.why: This document is explicitly marked as confidential.
confidential.marker.suggestedAction: Check with the document owner if you're unsure.

confidential.ma.title: M&A content
confidential.ma.why: Merger and acquisition information is highly confidential and market-sensitive.

ip.content.title: Intellectual property
ip.content.why: This may contain proprietary information or trade secrets.
ip.content.suggestedAction: Have legal review before sharing externally.

dictionary.finance.title: Finance-related content
dictionary.finance.why: This contains financial terms that may be sensitive.
dictionary.finance.suggestedAction: Review whether this should be shared externally.

dictionary.hr.title: HR-related content
dictionary.hr.why: This contains HR terms that may involve personal data.
dictionary.hr.suggestedAction: HR content often shouldn't be shared externally.

dictionary.legal.title: Legal-related content
dictionary.legal.why: This contains legal terms that may be privileged.

dictionary.match.title: Flagged by policy
dictionary.match.why: This contains terms flagged by your organization's policy.

overall.critical.title: Highly sensitive content
overall.critical.why: This file contains information that needs careful review before sharing.
overall.critical.suggestedAction: Review each item and consider whether this upload is necessary.

overall.high.title: Sensitive content
overall.high.why: This file contains information that may be protected.
overall.high.suggestedAction: Consider removing sensitive details before uploading.

overall.medium.title: Some details to review
overall.medium.why: This file contains some personal or internal information.
overall.medium.suggestedAction: Make sure you're comfortable sharing this externally.

overall.low.title: Minor details found
overall.low.why: Only minor patterns were found. This file will be shared with an external service.
overall.low.suggestedAction: Proceed if you're comfortable sharing this.
